findings.title: Replay harness drops input correlation IDs
findings.detail: feedStep constructs every replay event with only Kind, At, and Session, so the resumed-run agent_ready/input_ack path never carries an InputID. That leaves Dispatch.BriefInput and LastAckedInput empty during the fault matrix, which means the replay tier is not exercising the RSM-required monotonic input-sequence correlation or the duplicate-ack drop path under FaultDup/input_ack. A regression in correlated resume-input handling could pass these L2 replay tests.
findings.suggested_fix: Have the harness mint a deterministic InputID for each dispatch input, attach it to EvAgentReady and the corresponding EvInputAck, and assert ActDeliverInput uses the same ID before acknowledging it.
